name: Baked Sausage Cups and Scrambled Eggs
recipeIngredient: Quaker Oats, uncooked - 1/2 cup (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
Scrambled Eggs:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over low heat.
2. Beat eggs, salt, pepper (if using), and milk together until fluffy.
3. Pour the mixture into the skillet and cook, stirring lightly, until just set.
4. Arrange sausage cups around the scrambled eggs on a serving platter.
5. Garnish with parsley.
Sausage Cups:
1. Combine all ingredients thoroughly in a bowl.
2. Press firmly into six 5-oz. ovenproof custard cups.
3. Place the cups in a shallow baking pan.
4. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for about 45 minutes.
5. Unmold and drain on absorbent paper.
